cities.name: Male
cities.notes: Colorful Fish Market, Friday Mosque and Grand Friday Mosque

cities.name: Maafushi
cities.notes: Budget local island with guesthouses, sandbank excursions and diving

cities.name: Baa Atoll
cities.notes: UNESCO Biosphere Reserve with manta ray aggregations and whale sharks

cities.name: Ari Atoll
cities.notes: Luxury resort strip, nurse sharks and hammerhead cleaning stations

itinerary.sim: Dhiraagu Tourist SIM is the safest airport pickup for 4G coverage across Malé, Maafushi, Baa Atoll and Ari Atoll; Ooredoo Maldives is the closest backup and is similarly priced.

Male.name: Male
Male.note: Use Male as the cultural gateway and buffer night if your incoming flight lands too late for a same-day seaplane transfer.

days.theme: Old Mosque, Markets and a Soft Landing into the Maldives

activities.name: Airport ferry from Velana Airport to Male
activities.tip: Runs every 10–15 minutes and is far cheaper than taking a taxi via Hulhumalé.

activities.name: Hukuru Miskiy (Friday Mosque)
activities.tip: Visit outside prayer hours and carry clothing that covers shoulders and knees.

activities.name: Sultan Park and National Museum
Islamic Centre and Grand Friday Mosque exterior stop
Fish Market and Local Market waterfront walk
Whale Submarine coral-viewing ride
activities.tip: Skip Monday and Friday because departures are limited or closed.

Ari Atoll.name: Ari Atoll
Ari Atoll.note: This block is optimized for South Ari bases such as Dhigurah, Vilamendhoo or LUX* so you can combine whale-shark water time with one proper dive or lagoon day.

days.theme: Arrival in Whale Shark Territory, House Reef and Dolphin Sunset

activities.name: Transfer from Male to South Ari Atoll by domestic flight or seaplane
activities.tip: Domestic flight to Maamigili plus speedboat is the budget-friendly option; seaplane is faster and more scenic but daytime only.

activities.name: House reef snorkel after check-in
Whale shark encounter near Maamigili
activities.tip: Keep a rash guard ready and expect operators to limit swim time in small guided batches.

activities.name: Sandbank picnic by speedboat
Sunset dolphin cruise on a dhoni

meals: East Market at LUX* South Ari Atoll

days.theme: Drift Dive, Local Island Culture and Night Fishing

activities.name: Scuba dive at Broken Rock or Rangali Channel
activities.tip: Reserve the dive the previous evening because tide windows decide which channel runs best.

activities.name: Mahibadhoo local island visit
Kayaking or stand-up paddleboarding in the lagoon
Traditional night fishing trip

hotels.name: Boutique Beach All Inclusive Diving Hotel

Baa Atoll.name: Baa Atoll
Baa Atoll.note: Baa Atoll works best as a Dharavandhoo-based UNESCO biosphere stay, with Hanifaru Bay as the anchor experience and one flex day for reef or island-hopping weather windows.

days.theme: UNESCO Biosphere Arrival, Lacquer Crafts and Reef Snorkeling

activities.name: Transfer from Ari Atoll to Baa Atoll via Male and Dharavandhoo
activities.tip: If you are staying at a resort, ask for a through-ticket or seaplane bundle so luggage is checked across both flights.

activities.name: Thulhaadhoo island craft visit for lacquerware shopping
Evening reef snorkel from Dharavandhoo or resort house reef
Sunset dolphin safari

meals: Rehendhi Restaurant at Reethi Beach Resort

days.theme: Hanifaru Bay Mantas, Channel Diving and a Slow Sunset

activities.name: Hanifaru Bay guided snorkeling session
activities.tip: Peak manta action is usually strongest from June to October, but tours run whenever marine conditions and sightings allow.

activities.name: Scuba dive at Nelivaru Haa or Dhonfanu Kandu
Fulhadhoo island beach escape
Marine biology talk or coral session
Traditional dhoni sunset cruise

hotels.name: Four Seasons Resort Maldives at Landaa Giraavaru

meals: Blu Beach Club at Four Seasons Landaa Giraavaru

Maafushi.name: Maafushi
Maafushi.note: Finish on Maafushi if you want one affordable local-island stay with easy speedboat access back to Male for departure day.

days.theme: Bikini Beach, Nurse Sharks and Local Island Energy

activities.name: Transfer from Baa Atoll to Maafushi via Male
activities.tip: Book the Dharavandhoo flight and Male–Maafushi speedboat on the same ticketing day because afternoon seats can sell out.

activities.name: Bikini Beach swim and relax block
Nurse shark snorkeling in Maafushi lagoon
Island hopping trip to Gulhi, sandbank and coral garden
Jet ski, parasailing or other watersports

days.theme: Final Snorkel, Male Supermarket Stop and Departure

activities.name: Early morning local reef snorkel
Traditional mas huni breakfast on the island
Shared speedboat from Maafushi back to Male
STO People’s Choice Supermart snack and souvenir stop in Male
Airport ferry from Male to Velana Airport

connections.method: Public airport ferry every 10–15 minutes; taxi via Hulhumalé is the late-night fallback.
Domestic flight to Maamigili plus resort or guesthouse speedboat, or direct seaplane transfer to resort islands.
Most practical routing is via Male with a domestic flight to Dharavandhoo, then a short speedboat hop onward.
Domestic flight Dharavandhoo to Male followed by a shared speedboat from Male Jetty to Maafushi.
Shared speedboat to Male and quick airport ferry connection for the final airport run.

extras: Indian passport holders receive a free 30-day visa on arrival, but you should still carry confirmed hotel bookings and proof of onward travel.
Alcohol is not served in Male or on local islands such as Maafushi and Dharavandhoo; only resort islands and Hulhule Island Hotel legally serve it.
Dress conservatively on local islands and switch to swimwear only on designated bikini beaches or resort islands.
Most big-ticket Maldives pricing is quoted in USD even when you pay locally, so carry some USD cash and keep XE handy for INR checks.
Seaplanes operate only in daylight, so late-arriving international flights often require a first night in Male or Hulhule before the atoll transfer.
Hanifaru Bay is seasonal and protected, so treat that Baa Atoll day as weather-and-marine-life dependent rather than guaranteed.
